title: Vanillatte
description: Just a shot of smooth – Vanilla, brewed better.
body:
☕ Vanillatte
A smooth, minimal Minecraft experience — brewed to perfection.

Vanillatte is a cozy, lightweight modpack designed for players who love the core feel of vanilla Minecraft, but want it refined, optimized, and beautiful.

This pack doesn't add magic, overhauls, or RPG systems. Instead, it focuses on:

1. ✅ Subtle performance and visual upgrades (shaders, textures, optimizations)

1. ✅ No recipe changes — survival progression stays untouched

1. ✅ A carefully brewed set of client-friendly mods for immersion and comfort

1. ✅ A sprinkle of personal flavor — tweak or remove as you wish

Whether you're building, surviving, or just enjoying the ambiance, Vanillatte keeps things simple, smooth, and respectful to the game’s original soul — just like your favorite flat white.

☕ Designed for peace. Built for performance. Vanilla, with love.
